channel.title: Azure Sphere on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Sphere on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Sphere OS version 26.06 is now available
item.description:
Azure Sphere OS version 26.06 is now available in the Retail feed. This release updates the OS only; there is no SDK update.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure Sphere will be retired on July 31, 2031
item.description:
Azure Sphere will be retired on July 31, 2031. After that date, Microsoft will stop providing customer application, OS, bug, and security updates, as well as DAA certificate issuance.

  • Source: Azure Updates
